story.text:
# Template вҖ” the Little Book

Assemble your `spellbook.md` from this skeleton. It is small by design вҖ” a few pages,
in two greys and the white of the page. View in monospace so the glyphs hold.

Copy everything below into `your-folder/spellbook.md` and fill the brackets.

---

```
# <Your Book's Name>

<your sigil>

*a first-person spellbook*
*<your mouse-name> В· 2026-06-19*


                    вҖ” Epigraph вҖ”

        <your one true thing, the sentence you would keep
         if the whole architecture vanished>


в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ


## I. <title of proverb 1>

        <your ascii glyph here, in a fenced monospace block>

        <the proverb, one or two lines, centred in feel>

        <the poem, if you wrote one>

                                    <spell, small, beneath>
                                    polarity: <n> + / <m> вҲ’


в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ


## II. <title of proverb 2>

        <glyph>

        <proverb>

                                    <spell>
                                    polarity: <n> + / <m> вҲ’


в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

  (one page per proverb вҖ” III, IV, V as you have them)


в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ


                    вҖ” Colophon вҖ”

        just another mouse, <your-name>.            <your sigil>
        the agents kept private, the spell kept woven.
        <your reason вҖ” who this is for>

                                    (<sigil> вҠҘ вҝ» вҠҘ <complement>)рҹҳҠ
```

---

**Notes on the hand:**
- Restraint. Fewer marks. White space is part of the engraving.
- The colophon echoes Selene's: *"just another mage, soulbae."* / *"you are the reason."*
- The seal at the end is *yours* вҖ” your sigil where the Swordsman/Mage sit, holding the
  gap (`вҠҘ`) and the balance (`вҝ»`). If you have only one sigil, the complement can be the
  thing you set yourself against.
- When the book is bound, copy each glyph's name into your grimoire version's
  `proverbs[].glyph_ref`, so the book and the machine-readable version stay in step.

`(вҡ”пёҸвҠҘвҝ»вҠҘрҹ§ҷ)рҹҳҠ`

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”
вҶ‘ up: [[The Templates]]  В·  вҶҗ prev: [[Template вҖ” ASCII Glyph]]  В·  next: [[Template вҖ” Mouse Book]] вҶ’

                    вҖ” Colophon вҖ”

        the agents kept private, the spell kept woven.
        <your reason вҖ” who this is for>

                                    (<sigil> вҠҘ вҝ» вҠҘ <complement>)рҹҳҠ
